title: Run VMware resources on Azure VMware Solution
summary: Learn about Azure VMware Solution, how to deploy the resource, and how to migrate VMware virtual machines on-premises.

sections.title: Run VMware resources on Azure VMware Solution
sections.summary: Learn about Azure VMware Solution, how to deploy the resource, and how to migrate VMware virtual machines on-premises.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Learn about Azure VMware Solution to host your VMware workloads in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying an Azure VMware Solution resource. Then, connect your VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying Azure VMware Solution

lessons.title: Migrate VMware vSphere resources from on-premises to Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to migrate virtual machines from an on-premises VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution by using VMware HCX.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-vmware-workloads-on-premises-azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate VMware vSphere resources from on-premises to Azure VMware Solution

lessons.title: Secure outbound internet connectivity for Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Secure outbound internet connectivity for Azure VMware Solution using Azure Route Server, Azure Firewall, and third-party NVA

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure outbound internet connectivity for Azure VMware Solution

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Arc-enabled VMware vSphere
lessons.content_md:
Learn about Azure Arc enabled VMware vSphere

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-azure-arc-enabled-vmware-vsphere/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to Azure Arc-enabled VMware vSphere

lessons.title: Using Azure NetApp Files with Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
This module helps you understand Azure NetApp Files and how to use it with the Azure VMware Solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-netapp-files-with-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Using Azure NetApp Files with Azure VMware Solution

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Run VMware resources on Azure VMware Solution
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Run VMware resources on Azure VMware Solution**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
